name: OM SYSTEM OM-1 Mirrorless Camera with 12-40mm f/2.8 Lens
description: At the crossroads of image quality, portability, speed, and reliability, the OM-1, from OM SYSTEM is a flagship mirrorless camera built for adventure.

features.Key Features: 20MP Stacked BSI Live MOS MFT Sensor | DCI/UHD 4K 60p 10-Bit Video Recording | 10 fps Shooting, 120 fps with E. Shutter | Cross Quad Pixel Phase-Detection AF | 5.76m-Dot OLED Electronic Viewfinder | 3.0" 1.62m-Dot Swivel Touchscreen LCD | 5-Axis In-Body Image Stabilization | High-Res Shot, Live ND & Composite Modes | IP53 Weather-Sealed & Freezeproof Design | M.Zuiko 12-40mm f/2.8 PRO II Lens
features.What’s In The Box: OM SYSTEM OM-1 Mirrorless Camera with 12-40mm f/2.8 | OM SYSTEM BLX-1 Lithium-Ion Battery (7.2V, 2280mAh) | OM SYSTEM CB-USB13 USB Connection Cable | USB-AC Adapter | Eyecup | Shoulder Strap | FL-LM3 Flash | Front Lens Cap | Rear Lens Cap | Lens Wrapping Cloth | LH-66D Lens Hood
